sentences.target: えっ！猫を飼っているの？本当ですか？
sentences.reading: えっ！ねこをかっているの？ほんとうですか？

translations.en: Eh! You have a cat? Really?
translations.fr: Eh ! Tu as un chat ? Vraiment ?
translations.de: Eh! Du hast eine Katze? Wirklich?
translations.ru: Эх! У тебя есть кот? Правда?
translations.pt: Eh! Você tem um gato? Sério?
translations.tr: Eh! Kedin mi var? Gerçekten mi?
translations.vi: Eh! Bạn có một con mèo? Thực sự?
translations.nl: Eh! Je hebt een kat? Echt?
translations.uk: Ех! У тебе є кіт? Справді?
translations.hi: एह! आपके पास एक बिल्ली है? वाक़ई?
translations.sv: Eh! Har du en katt? Verkligen?
translations.da: Eh! Har du en kat? Virkelig?

tokens.explanation: Expresses surprise or disbelief.
The animal being mentioned; the direct object of『飼っている』.
Marks『猫』as the direct object.
Progressive form of『飼う』, meaning 'to have/keep a pet'.
Nominalizing particle used for seeking explanation or confirmation.
The noun 'truth'; part of the phrase asking if it is true.
Polite copula linking『本当』to the polite question.
Marks the sentence as a question.

sentences.target: 東京から来たんですか？本当ですか？
sentences.reading: とうきょうからきたんですか？ほんとうですか？

translations.zh-Hans: 你是从东京来的？真的吗？
translations.vi: Bạn đến từ Tokyo? Thực sự?
translations.hi: आप टोक्यो से आए हैं? वाक़ई?

tokens.explanation: The place of origin being asked about.
Marks『東京』as the starting point.
Past form of『来る』, asking if the person came (from Tokyo).
Explanatory『の』contraction used before『です』to soften the question.
Polite copula after explanatory『ん』.
Marks the sentence as a question.
The noun 'truth'; part of the phrase asking if it is true.
Polite copula linking『本当』to the polite question.
Marks the sentence as a question.

sentences.target: このテストは簡単だったんですか？本当ですか？
sentences.reading: このてすとはかんたんだったんですか？ほんとうですか？

translations.it: Questo test è stato facile? Davvero?
translations.zh-Hans: 这场考试很简单？真的吗？
translations.tr: Bu test kolay mıydı? Gerçekten mi?
translations.vi: Bài kiểm tra này dễ dàng? Thực sự?
translations.ar: هل كان هذا الاختبار سهلا؟ حقا؟
translations.hu: Ez a teszt könnyű volt? Valóban?
translations.el: Αυτό το τεστ ήταν εύκολο; Αλήθεια?
translations.sv: Var det här testet lätt? Verkligen?
translations.ro: Acest test a fost ușor? Chiar?

tokens.explanation: Modifies『テスト』to specify it as 'this test'.
The subject being discussed.
Marks『このテスト』as the topic of the sentence.
Describes the test's difficulty.
Past form of the copula『だ』, indicating past state.
Explanatory『の』contraction used before『です』to soften the question.
Polite copula after explanatory『ん』.
Marks the sentence as a question.
The noun 'truth'; part of the phrase asking if it is true.
Polite copula linking『本当』to the polite question.
Marks the sentence as a question.

sentences.target: この靴は千円だったんですか？本当ですか？
sentences.reading: このくつはせんえんだったんですか？ほんとうですか？

translations.tr: Bu ayakkabılar 1000 yen miydi? Gerçekten mi?
translations.vi: Đôi giày này có giá 1000 yên? Thực sự?
translations.ar: هل كانت هذه الأحذية بسعر 1000 ين؟ حقا؟
translations.hu: Ezek a cipők 1000 jenbe kerültek? Valóban?
translations.hi: ये जूते 1000 येन के थे? वाक़ई?
translations.el: Αυτά τα παπούτσια ήταν 1000 γιεν; Αλήθεια?
translations.sv: De här skorna kostade 1000 yen? Verkligen?
translations.ro: Acești pantofi au costat 1000 yeni? Chiar?

tokens.explanation: Modifies『靴』to specify it as 'this pair of shoes'.
The item being discussed.
Marks『この靴』as the topic.
The price being asked about.
Past form of『だ』, indicating past state or price.
Explanatory『の』contraction used before『です』to soften the question.
Polite copula after explanatory『ん』.
Marks the sentence as a question.
The noun 'truth'; part of the phrase asking if it is true.
Polite copula linking『本当』to the polite question.
Marks the sentence as a question.
